{{Quote|Subject has many ties to galactic organized crime. Armed and dangerous.|Karsunn Nepto's bounty brief|<ref name="Hunter" />}}
'''Karsunn Nepto''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] criminal wanted by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for having ties to several prominent crime syndicates. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] for his arrest was posted by the Security Force to interrogate him. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] found Nepto on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]]. Nepto fled and ambushed Fett with a group of thugs but was eventually captured alive by the bounty [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] for a sum of 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==Biography==
[[File:JangoFett-NEGTC.png|thumb|right|190px|Nepto's bounty was claimed by Jango Fett (pictured).]]
[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] before<ref name="Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|II|370-371|Nepto, Karsunn}}</ref> [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="date">The events of ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' take place in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Karsunn Nepto was a criminal wanted [[Death|dead]] or alive by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for having ties to<ref name="Hunter" /> several prominent crime syndicates. The Republic Security Force posted the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] for<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> his<ref name="Guide" /> arrest to interrogate him.<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> His bounty mentioned that his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was unknown but that his last known location was in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. A sum of 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] was offered if Nepto was captured alive or 1,500 if captured dead. It also stated that he had ties to ex-convicts and was [[Weapon/Legends|armed]] and dangerous.<ref name="Hunter" />

In 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="date" /> [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] was [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] for the [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] [[Drug dealer|dealer]] [[Jervis Gloom]] on Coruscant. During this time, Fett encountered Nepto<ref name="Hunter" /> in an L-shaped antechamber in the Entertainment District.<ref name="Guide" /> 
{{Gamemechanics}}
Upon seeing Fett, Nepto ran for the door to escape, running outside to a group of thugs. Fett followed the Nikto and was ambushed by Nepto and the thugs. The bounty hunter dispatched the thugs and captured Nepto alive for the full sum of [[Currency/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Guide" /> 
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Nepto was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. The [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] had connections to crime syndicates and ex-convicts.<ref name="Hunter" />

==Equipment==
He wore a grey [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] over a red [[shirt]] with tan [[Clothing/Legends|pants]] and black [[Boot/Legends|boots]]. Nepto carried a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="Hunter" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:BountyHunter-Cover.jpg|thumb|left|240px|Karsunn Nepto is an optional secondary bounty in ''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter''.]]
Karsunn Nepto first appeared in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' developed by [[LucasArts]].<ref name="Hunter" /> In the game's accompanying strategy guide written by [[David Hodgson]], ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'', Nepto's last known location on his bounty is incorrectly listed as "deep [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] along core [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]]."<ref name="Guide" /> 

In the game, Nepto is the ninth optional secondary bounty that the player can capture in the Coruscant Entertainment District and is labeled as the thirty-fourth bounty overall. Nepto is able to be captured by the player for a higher sum of credits or killed for a lower amount. When confronted, a chase scenario can ensue where Nepto attempts to flee to protection but can be captured before he makes it to his thugs.<ref name="Hunter" /> While Nepto's capture by Fett was confirmed to have [[canon]]ically occurred by the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'',<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> this article assumes that his capture included the full chase scenario.
